programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, twin cats, go on adventures and protect each other at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey, Bunny, Popat and Zordaar look around for numerous ways to entertain themselves. Eventually, they are delighted when their master plans a trip to the forest.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Zordaar's Chacha annoys everyone when he visits his home. Later, the friends decide to teach him a lesson after he eats all of their food.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss katkar punishes popat and asks him to clean the store room due to the chaos caused. However, while cleaning the store room, he gets coated in red paint.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and team are chilling outside when they see a bunch of people walking towards Khanna's house. Soon, they realise it is a party organised by Kitty for her friends.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Khanna and Miss Katkar bring kites for the gang as there is a kite festival. Soon, they decide to compete in flying kites.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst Shin-chan is conducting his shenanigans in the park to entertain his friends, Nene-chan arrives in search of Masao-chan.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his friends discuss the stories of Action Mask in the park. Afterwards, they decide to role-play as characters from Action Mask's plot but Nene-chan arrives wanting to play house.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae falls ill, Shin-chan tries to care for her and fills an ice bag with water. However, he leaves the tap running and causes the house to flood.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When the Saitama Red Scorpion Corps assembles, Ryuko realises that Marie is missing. Afterwards, she is apprised that Marie is unwell and at the hospital.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The students of Futaba Kindergarten are guided by Yoshinaga sensei for a school fair where Masao-chan amazes everyone with a catalogue of different species of fish.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a summer day in the city, Shin-chan feels thirsty and asks Misae for barley tea. However, Misae realises that she has left it at home.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: After Oggy manages to get rid of the cockroaches, he finds himself in peaceful and serene surroundings, but he starts to feel dull a few moments later.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Jack and Oggy win the lottery, but one of the cockroaches gets hold of the winning ticket.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Inspired by a television programme, Oggy steals a car part from his neighbour Bob to build a flute. Later, he turns the stolen object into a musical instrument by drilling holes into it.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy is fascinated by the magic snake charmer that he has just seen on the television and decides to make his own magic flute out of an exhaust pipe.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy finds himself in a horrible quandary when a turkey hides behind him, leading its hunter to chase Oggy while the cockroaches are entertained by the whole fiasco.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan and Himawari on a trip to Kumamoto in the company of Koyama who appears to be lacking in excitement.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Nene-chan informs her mother that she is leaving for her piano recitals, the latter asks her to wait and hands her a security buzzer.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The members of the Saitama Beni Scorpion Corps assemble in front of their school. Consequently, their ridiculous display draws judgemental remarks from other students.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Manav uses his mobile phone during class, the teacher confiscates it. Later, Tauba Tauba reveals that Meher might be the solution to Mahabhasm Pari's problem.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer gives Meher a magical locket to protect her as she makes her way back home. Later, Mahabhasm Pari warns Meher to step forward if she wants to save her friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Mahabhasm Pari snatches Meher's locket and diverts the aeroplane to Bhasm Lok. In the meantime, Rani Pari and the fairies worry about Mahabhasm Pari's intentions.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer promises Manav that he will rescue Meher and bring her home. Further, Baalveer locates the aeroplane and struggles to hold on to it.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Meher's family members and her friends gather to pray for her safety. Meanwhile, when Baalveer enters the aeroplane, Mahabhasm Pari attacks him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi and his wife decide to make a special breakfast for all the residents of Gokuldham colony. So, they go to each house to make sure that nobody eats anything before their surprise breakfast.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The whole of Gokuldham Colony is in anticipation of the special Banarasi Breakfast that Dr Hathi has organised for sunday.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide puts up the quote of the day in order to highlight the importance of water, hoping that the members of Gokuldham colony would understand the severity of the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his family head out in a cab, while Popatlal is waiting for the plumber. He receives a call asking him to get to the office as soon as possible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is shocked to see Sunita, a vegetable vendor, threatening Babita. Later, Jethalal rushes to confront Sunita about her actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his family are shocked as a couple of men leave two sacks of lemons at their house. Later, Bhide struggles to figure out what to do with the lemons.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his wife decide to start selling lemons in order to get rid of them. However, Bhide is soon left feeling embarrassed by the job.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his wife strive to sell the lemons in an attempt to get rid of them. However, the couple struggles to find buyers for the lemons.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha buys the lemons from Bhide and brings them to Jethalal's godown. Bagha then shares his plan of selling the lemons by setting up a stall in front of Jethalal's godown.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Sodhi land in trouble as the police begin to investigate their vehicle. Later, the duo is accused of smuggling lemons.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide, Sodhi and Bagha land in trouble as they are caught smuggling lemons by the police. Soon, the police inspector questions Bhide's character.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Bhide bump into Guddu who accuses them of breaking his heart. Later, Guddu vows to settle scores with Sodhi and Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide indulge in a game of dumb charades as the former tries to communicate something to Bhide. However, Bhide struggles to comprehend what Jethalal is saying.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide leaves Madhvi fuming with his irritating antics at home. However, on realising his mistake, Bhide vows to cheer Madhvi up.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When Reva, a famous actress, falls unconscious after an unexpected accident, the team investigate. Later, the team suspect foul play as the accident seems deliberate.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When a businessman named Dhiren is discharged from the hospital, he is found dead in his car. Later, the team investigate and find out some shocking facts about Dhiren's family dynamics.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal adamantly refuses to use influence for Tapu's admission, Taarak Mehta makes a suggestion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A disillusioned Jethalal learns about Rocky, a boy who got admission despite a low score. Later, he replays this information to Daya and Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After learning about the scam, Taarak and Jethalal make a plan to expose Setting Bhai. They approach him and desperately plead for his help to get Tapu admitted to M. K. Gandhi College.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal excitedly brings a nice gift for Setting Bhai and expresses his earnest desire to meet his boss.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Taarak and Jethalal reach trustee Khare's office, they are shocked by his behaviour. They were prepared to record the proceedings on the spy camera and catch the trustee red-handed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal wants to unearth the cash-for-admission scam going on in MK Gandhi College. Later, he vows to bring out the truth and help those who don't get admission despite scoring well.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal wants to unearth the cash-for-admission scam going on in MK Gandhi College. He vows to bring out the truth and help those who don't get admission despite scoring well.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati
programme.desc: Host Amitabh Bachchan asks a series of questions to several contestants to test their general knowledge and give them a chance to win a cash prize.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sanjana is in for a shock as Popatlal confesses his love for her in public. She eventually finds herself at a loss of words to respond to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sanjana speaks with Popatlal over the phone and professes her love for him. She promises to introduce him to her father and requests him to meet her at the reception.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha, Jethalal and Champaklal try to turn the tables on Sanjana to free Popatlal. The trio is shocked as Sanjana refuses to budge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Sanjana talks to her boss about their plan, Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha overhear her. The trio confronts Sanjana about her intentions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha find themselves in trouble when the black marketers realise their true identity and try to chase them down.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal finds himself at a major risk of being electrocuted and starts to panic. Jethalal becomes disguised and looks for Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal, Bagha and Champaklal are on the run from the black marketers, the police decide to intervene by visiting the resort.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is tense when Daya gets a threatening phone call. Later, the cops decide to provide security for Daya and her family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal disguises himself in order to get some urgent work done. However, he suddenly gets kidnapped by the goons.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya somehow manages to rescue Jethalal from the goons in her unique way. The gangster exacts revenge and plans to kidnap Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While the police keep a strict vigil on the Gada family, the gangster's brother-in-law tries to intimidate the cops.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of the society show concern and offer their support to the Gadas. The gangster's wife pressurises him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the morning, Sodhi offers to take Tapu to his school. Meanwhile, the gangsters devise an infallible plan to kidnap Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The gangsters arrive at Gokuldham society and lie to the police that they have an injured patient who needs to meet Dr Hathi. The police and the gangsters later engage in a firing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya expresses her gratitude toward Jethalal for saving her from the kidnappers. Later, she is determined to testify.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya decides not to testify and tells the gangster about it. However, Jethalal surprisingly challenges him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The gangster visits Gokuldham society in the garb of a godman and successfully lands in Daya's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the name of a prayer ritual, the god man and his men succeed in executing their plan of kidnapping Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his gang awaken the cops and the members of Gokuldham Society. Everyone is shocked at what's happened.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A cunning Daya figures out the location of where she's being kept captive. Later, she conveys the same to her family and friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everybody agrees to Jethalal's questionable plan and reaches the gangster's hideout by avoiding the authorities.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Rana tries to scare away the members. Daya manages to talk sense into the gangster's wife with her clever move.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balancer her emotional turmoils.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena creates a social media challenge in an attempt to bust the domestic help scam. However, Karishma is bewildered by Haseena's methods.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma is shocked to learn that Piya is being harassed by her lover and wishes to be saved from his clutches. Soon, she decides to confront him about the matter.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men meet for their soda party. However, since there are no limes available at Abdul's shop, they decide to pluck some from a place nearby.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham breathe a sigh of relief as they prove their innocence to the police. However, things soon take an unexpected turn as Bhide spots an intruder in the house.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.desc: Haseena creates a social media challenge in an attempt to bust the domestic help scam. However, Karishma is bewildered by Haseena's methods.

programme.desc: Karishma is shocked to learn that Piya is being harassed by her lover and wishes to be saved from his clutches. Soon, she decides to confront him about the matter.

programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balancer her emotional turmoils.

programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham breathe a sigh of relief as they prove their innocence to the police. However, things soon take an unexpected turn as Bhide spots an intruder in the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena wonders why Pinku is upset when they talk about each others' parents. Meanwhile, Chachaji has locked the society gates.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Chachaji are looking for Tapu. Jethalal is worried but, it is soon revealed that Tapu has been home all along.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balancer her emotional turmoils.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Dial 100
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Crime Patrol 2.0
programme.desc: The host presents the re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Master Chef India
programme.desc: Aspiring chefs and food lovers from various parts of India showcase their culinary skills in front of prominent judges to win the title and grand prize money.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.desc: Sai saves a man's life through his miracles. Meanwhile, Sugandha's husband and in-laws lock Sugandha in a dark room post her arrival back home.

programme.desc: Sugandha's mother has a nightmare about her daughter. Later, Sugandha's mother looks for Sai's reassurance and comfort for her daughter's well-being.
